description: Change adapter injection timing from status:'complete' to status:'loading' so adapters are injected before page JavaScript runs. This allows plugins to read volatile auth state (like localStorage tokens) before the host app deletes it. Combined with a Discord plugin change to cache the token at first read.

userStories.title: Inject adapters at status:'loading' instead of status:'complete'
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want adapters to be injected before page JavaScript runs so that my plugin can intercept or read state that the host app modifies or deletes during initialization
acceptanceCriteria: Adapters are injected when chrome.tabs.onUpdated fires with status:'loading' instead of status:'complete'
The isReady probe and tab state check are deferred to status:'complete' (NOT at loading time) to avoid false 'unavailable' reports before page globals exist
Existing plugins (Slack, e2e-test) continue to work correctly — their isReady polling handles the timing gap
The adapter IIFE wrapper registers on globalThis.__openTabs at injection time (no DOM access needed)
SPA navigations (pushState/replaceState) are unaffected — they don't trigger onUpdated
npm run build passes
npm run type-check passes
npm run lint passes
npm run knip passes
npm run test passes
npm run test:e2e passes

userStories.title: Cache Discord auth token at first read so it survives localStorage deletion
userStories.description: As a Discord user, I want the Discord plugin to cache the auth token after first successful read so that tool calls continue working even after Discord deletes the token from localStorage
acceptanceCriteria: getAuth() caches the token in a module-level variable after first successful read
Subsequent getAuth() calls return the cached token without re-reading localStorage
isDiscordAuthenticated() uses the cached token if available
If the cached token results in a 401 API error, the cache is cleared and getAuth() retries from localStorage (handles token rotation)
The iframe localStorage fallback is still used as a fallback when direct localStorage access fails AND no cached token exists
cd plugins/discord && npm run build passes
cd plugins/discord && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/discord && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/discord && npm run format:check passes
